lessons: Grapple has 0 wins in last 9 rounds and 1 win in 19 total plays — abandon it entirely unless under pickup_surge (which has no data support).
Sword users (Warden, Executioner, Shredder, Reaper) caused 8 of last 10 deaths — engage only with sword or spear from cover, never with grapple.
Shield users (Juggernaut, Fortress) killed us 5 of last 6 rounds — grapple cannot penetrate shields; switch to spear or sword for direct damage.
Bow users (Deadeye, Andrew-Test, GhostProtocol) have 50+ kills vs us historically — avoid open ground; only engage from tight corridors or elevated positions.
Teleport_surge rounds saw 90%+ enemy use of spear and daggers — avoid this modifier unless armed with spear or sword.
Shredder and Reaper have killed us 3+ times each in last 5 rounds — both use sword/staff and exploit grapple’s range; retreat or flank aggressively on sight.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Sword is the only weapon that has successfully killed multiple high-threat opponents (Warden, Reaper, Shredder) in recent rounds and counters the dominant enemy loadout.
